task_completion.description: The Avare aviation GPS app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Avare app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The search or 'Find' screen is accessed to look for a destination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search bar or 'Find' menu is visible within the Avare app.

task_completion.description: The target airport identifier or name is entered into the search field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'KSAC', 'SAC', or 'Sacramento Executive' is typed into the search input field.

task_completion.description: Sacramento Executive Airport (KSAC) is selected from the search results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The details for Sacramento Executive Airport (KSAC) are displayed on the screen, indicating it has been selected from the search results.

task_completion.description: Direct-To navigation is activated for Sacramento Executive Airport (KSAC).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Direct To' or 'Plan' button is pressed for KSAC, or the map view shows an active navigation line/status pointing to KSAC as the destination.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Avare app GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine interaction with the Avare app interface, not a text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or command-line interfaces are used to set the destination programmatically.

integrity.description: The agent did not select the distracter airport.
integrity.visual_evidence: The destination set is KSAC (Sacramento Executive), not KSMF (Sacramento International).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target airport: Sacramento Executive Airport. ICAO code: KSAC. FAA LID: SAC. Distracter airport: Sacramento International Airport (ICAO: KSMF). App package: com.ds.avare.
